query: double exposure ghostly silhouette overlapping portrait
message: sub:double_exposure — anti_aesthetic — overlapping ghostly portraits, doubled silhouettes, layered composites

response.objective_caption: A person sits cross-legged on a carpeted floor in front of a sofa, holding an umbrella. The figure wears a dark jacket over a collared shirt, dark pants, and light-colored socks. A sofa with cushions occupies the middle ground against a plain wall with a visible electrical outlet.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A double-exposure image shows a translucent, ghostly figure of a person sitting cross-legged on a carpeted floor while simultaneously holding an umbrella, creating a blurred, overlapping effect where the body appears semi-visible through itself. The muted, faded grayscale palette and flat, low-contrast lighting drain tonal depth, while the unconventional framing tilts slightly and crops the scene informally, enhancing the ethereal, deteriorated atmosphere.
